title: ANC - Both modes disabled, turn on ANC, default value selected
scenario: ANC Mode does not default to "On - Adaptive" when enabled from a state where both ANC and Transparency are disabled
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected Poly audio device.
Ensure ANC Mode is set to Off.
Ensure Transparency Mode is set to Off.
Return to Audio Settings and tap on ANC to turn it On.
Observe the ANC mode that is selected by default.
expected: ANC Mode turns On and defaults to "On - Adaptive" mode. Transparency Mode remains disabled (Off).
